commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an internal file-backed plugin host session cleanup operation behind the session accessor, routes plugin host cleanup through it, expands the session-accessor writer guard into `src/plugins`, and adds multi-store cleanup coverage.

PR surface: Source +71, Tests +81, Other +2. Total +154 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: the PR head adds `src/plugins/host-hook-cleanup.ts` to the writer guard set while the PR-head ratchet test still expects the old set. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can update the missing writer-ratchet expectation; final merge still needs maintainer Path 3 review because the draft carries protected session-state sequencing risk.
